phrases.english: My dear mother, I love you.
Play with ideas, find your spark.
Let thoughts wander, discover something new.
phrases.romanian: Lasă gândurile să rătăcească, descoperă ceva nou.
phrases.transliteration: LAH-sah GUNDEH-roo-leh seh ruh-tah-CHEH-skah, deh-SKOH-pehr CHAH-vah no-oo.

phrases.english: Build on inspiration, bit by bit.
phrases.romanian: Construiește pe inspirație, pas cu pas.
phrases.transliteration: kohn-stroo-EHSH-teh peh in-spee-RAH-tsee-eh, PAHS koo pahs.

phrases.english: Embrace the unexpected, let it guide.
phrases.romanian: Îmbrățișează neașteptatul, lasă-l să te ghideze.
phrases.transliteration: uhm-bruh-tsee-SHAH-zah neh-ahsh-tehp-TAH-tool, LAH-suhl seh teh gee-DEH-zeh.

phrases.english: Speak with courage, even if you stumble.
phrases.romanian: Vorbește cu curaj, chiar dacă greșești.
phrases.transliteration: Vor-besh-teh koo koo-raj, chee-ar da-kuh gre-sh-tsh.

phrases.english: Every word matters, so say it loud.
You are learning, that's the point.
Your voice is strong, let it be heard.
phrases.romanian: Vocea ta e puternică, las-o să se audă.
phrases.transliteration: Voh-cha ta eh poo-ter-nee-kuh, las-oh suh seh ow-duh.

phrases.romanian: Mă simt fericit, cu adevărat liber.
phrases.transliteration: Muh seent feh-ree-cheet, koo ah-deh-vah-raht lee-behr.

phrases.romanian: Ascultă mai mult, vorbește mai puțin.
phrases.transliteration: As-kool-ta mai moolt, vor-besh-teh mai poot-seen.

phrases.romanian: Unde este cel mai apropiat magazin?
phrases.transliteration: Oon-deh es-teh chehl mai a-pro-pee-aht ma-ga-zeen?

phrases.english: I am looking for a souvenir.
Do you have this in blue?

phrases.romanian: Practica te face perfect, sau aproape.
phrases.transliteration: Prak-ti-ka te fa-che per-fekt, sau a-proa-pe.

phrases.english: Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
phrases.romanian: Nu te teme de greșeli, învață din ele.
phrases.transliteration: Nu te te-me de gre-she-li, in-vatz-a din e-le.

phrases.english: Believe in tomorrow, brighter days await.
phrases.romanian: Crede în mâine, zile mai bune te așteaptă.
phrases.transliteration: Creh-deh in mii-neh, zee-leh my boo-neh teh ah-shept-ah.

phrases.english: Little steps, big dreams, keep going.
Even in darkness, find a spark.
phrases.romanian: Chiar și-n întuneric, găsește o scânteie.
phrases.transliteration: Kee-ar shee-n oon-too-neh-reek, guh-shesh-teh oh skuhn-tey-eh.

phrases.english: Your strength, your light, shines through.
Tomorrow brings new chances, embrace them.

phrases.romanian: O masă pentru doi, vă rog.
phrases.transliteration: O MAS-uh PER-too DOY, vuh ROG.

phrases.english: Every word counts, little by little.

phrases.romanian: Am nevoie de un taxi, vă rog.
phrases.transliteration: Ahm neh-voh-yeh deh oon tahk-see, vuh rog.

phrases.romanian: Pot să am nota, vă rog?
phrases.transliteration: Poht suh ahm noh-tah, vuh rog?

phrases.english: Be present, right here, right now.
phrases.romanian: Fii prezent, chiar aici, chiar acum.
phrases.transliteration: Fee pre-zent, chee-ar a-yeetch, chee-ar a-koom.

phrases.english: Feel the ground, beneath your feet.
Sketch your vision, color your world.
Mix your passions, invent your path.

phrases.romanian: Pune sub semnul întrebării totul, caută noi unghiuri.
phrases.transliteration: POO-neh soob SEHM-nool uhn-treh-BAH-ree TOH-tool, KAH-oo-tah no-oy OONG-yoo-ree.

phrases.english: Dare to be different, express yourself.
A new dawn is coming, be ready.
phrases.romanian: Un nou răsărit vine, fii pregătit.
phrases.transliteration: Oon noy ruh-sah-reet vee-neh, fee preh-guh-teet.

phrases.english: Hold on, sunshine follows the rain.
Keep your heart open, good things will come.
phrases.romanian: Păstrează-ți inima deschisă, lucruri bune vor veni.
phrases.transliteration: Puhs-treh-zah-tzee ee-nee-mah deh-skees-sah, look-roor boo-neh vor veh-nee.

phrases.romanian: Învață din greșeli, devino mai puternic.
phrases.transliteration: En-vah-tsuh deen gre-shel, deh-vee-noh my poo-ter-neek.

phrases.english: Aunt, thank you for the gift.

phrases.romanian: Încearcă din nou, cu un zâmbet.
phrases.transliteration: Uhn-cher-kuh deen noh-oo, koo uhn zum-bet.

phrases.english: You can do this, one sentence at a time.
phrases.romanian: Poți face asta, o propoziție pe rând.
phrases.transliteration: Poh-tzee fa-cheh as-ta, oh proh-poh-zee-tzee-eh peh rund.

phrases.english: Embrace the challenge, learn and grow.
This moment, is all there is.
phrases.romanian: Acest moment, e tot ce e.
phrases.transliteration: A-chest mo-ment, eh tot che eh.

phrases.english: Notice the light, on your skin.
Be kind, to your own mind.
phrases.romanian: Fii blând, cu propria ta minte.
phrases.transliteration: Fee bluhnd, koo pro-pree-a ta meen-te.

phrases.romanian: Ajutor, vă rog. Am nevoie de ajutor.
phrases.transliteration: Ah-JOO-tor, vuh ROG. Ahm NEH-vo-yeh deh ah-JOO-tor.

phrases.english: I am lost. Can you help?

phrases.romanian: Am nevoie de un doctor. Repede.
phrases.transliteration: Ahm NEH-vo-yeh deh oon DOK-tor. REH-peh-deh.

phrases.english: Sing it loud, with your heart.
Feel the beat, move your feet.

phrases.romanian: Echipa, face visul să prindă viață.
phrases.transliteration: Eh-KEE-pah, fah-CHEH VEE-sool s'h prind-uh vee-AH-tsuh.

phrases.english: Focus, on the task at hand.
Feel the earth, hold your pose.
Discover Romania, one sentence at a time.
Embrace the rhythm, of Romanian speech.
Unlock Romanian stories, with your voice.
phrases.romanian: Dezvăluie povești românești, cu vocea ta.
phrases.transliteration: Dez-vuh-loo-yeh po-vesht roo-moo-nesht, koo vo-chah tah.

phrases.english: Build your vocabulary, bit by bit.
Each small seed, becomes a tree.
Discover the rhythm, of the unfolding.
The quiet growth, is often the strongest.
phrases.romanian: Creșterea tăcută, e adesea cea mai puternică.
phrases.transliteration: Krehsh'tehr-yah tuh-koo'tuh, eh uh-dehs'yah cheh my puh-tehr'nee-kuh.

phrases.english: Open your mind, Romanian will bloom.
Speak with courage, connect with ease.
Plan your money, secure your future.
Explore the unseen, feel the pull.
Nurture a seed, watch it grow.
phrases.romanian: Crește o sămânță, privește cum prinde viață.
phrases.transliteration: Creș-te o să-mân-ță, pri-veș-te cum prin-de via-ță.

phrases.english: Listen closely, to your inner voice.
phrases.romanian: Ascultă atent, la glasul din tine.
phrases.transliteration: As-cul-tă a-tent, la gla-sul din ti-ne.

phrases.english: Connect the dots, a new pattern.
Paint with feelings, bright and bold.
phrases.romanian: Pictează cu simțiri, viu și curajos.
phrases.transliteration: Pic-tea-ză cu sim-țiri, viu și cu-ra-jos.

phrases.english: The cat sleeps, on the mat.
A dog barks, at the door.
A fish swims, in the water.
The bee buzzes, near the flower.

phrases.romanian: În fiecare zi, un cuvânt nou.
phrases.transliteration: In fe-eh-kah-reh zee, oon koo-vunt noo.

phrases.english: Taste the tradition, feel the history.
Hear the old songs, dance with joy.
phrases.romanian: Aude cântece vechi, dansează cu bucurie.
phrases.transliteration: Ow-deh cun-teh-cheh vek, dan-seh-zah coo boo-koo-ree-eh.

phrases.english: Explore the villages, find hidden gems.
Share a meal, make a friend.
phrases.romanian: Împărtășește o masă, fă un prieten.
phrases.transliteration: Um-pur-tah-shesh-teh oh mah-suh, fuh oon pree-eh-ten.

phrases.romanian: Tu ești, raza mea de soare.
phrases.transliteration: Too esht, rah-zah me-ah deh soh-ah-reh.

phrases.romanian: Pentru totdeauna, cu tine, e acasă.
phrases.transliteration: Pehn-troo toh-t-deh-ah-oo-nah, koo tee-neh, eh ah-kah-suh.

phrases.romanian: Fructe de pădure dulci, o adevărată plăcere.
phrases.transliteration: Froo-kteh deh puh-doo-reh dool-chee, oh ah-deh-vuh-rah-tuh pluh-cheh-reh.

phrases.english: A quiet mind, a happy soul.
phrases.romanian: O minte liniștită, un suflet fericit.
phrases.transliteration: oh meen-teh lee-nee-shee-tah, oon soo-flet feh-ree-cheet

phrases.english: A gentle nod, means a lot.
phrases.romanian: Un semn din cap, valorează mult.
phrases.transliteration: Oon semn din kap, va-lo-reh-zahz moolt.

phrases.english: My new shoes, are so comfy.
phrases.romanian: Pantofii mei noi, sunt așa de confortabili.
phrases.transliteration: Pahn-toh-fee mei noy, soont ah-shah deh kon-for-tah-beel.

phrases.english: I like that dress, a lot.

phrases.romanian: Pantalonii ăștia, au nevoie de călcat.
phrases.transliteration: Pahn-tah-loh-nee ush-tyah, ow neh-voh-yeh deh kuh-lkaht.

phrases.english: A true, gem of a friend.
Could we have, a corner seat?
phrases.romanian: Putem să luăm, un loc la colț?
phrases.transliteration: Poo-tehm sah loo-ohm, oon lohk lah kohlts?

phrases.romanian: Lasă româna să înflorească, în tine.
phrases.transliteration: Las-ah ro-moo-nah sah een-flo-res-kas-ay, een tee-nay.

phrases.english: Taste the language, sip by sip.
Unlock Romania, one word at a time.
Listen to the rhythm, find the flow.
Taste the words, feel the culture.
This looks delicious, I'll take it.
Do you accept cards, or just cash?
I need something for the kitchen.
phrases.romanian: Am nevoie de ceva pentru bucătărie.
phrases.transliteration: Ahm neh-voh-yeh deh cheh-vah pehn-troo boo-kuh-tuh-ree-yeh.

phrases.english: Could you wrap this nicely, please?
phrases.romanian: Puteți împacheta asta frumos, vă rog?
phrases.transliteration: Poo-tetz em-pah-keh-tah ahs-tah froo-mohs, vuh rog?

phrases.english: Where can I find local crafts?
You really, came through, for me.
phrases.romanian: Chiar ai sărit, în ajutor, la nevoie.
phrases.transliteration: Cheer ah-ee sah-reet, in ah-zhoo-tohr, la neh-voy-eh.

phrases.romanian: Asta, a fost neașteptat, și minunat.
phrases.transliteration: Ah-stah, ah foast neh-ash-tehp-taht, shee mee-noo-naht.

phrases.english: Your support, makes all the difference.
Such a, thoughtful act, thank you.
phrases.romanian: Un gest, atât de atent, mulțumesc.
phrases.transliteration: Oon ghest, ah-toot deh ah-tehnt, mool-tzoo-mesk.

phrases.romanian: Mergi pe drumul tău, cu har.
phrases.transliteration: Mehrj peh droo-moo-loo tow, koo har.

phrases.romanian: Un moment de pace, este prețios.
phrases.transliteration: Oon moh-MENTH deh PAH-cheh, es-teh preh-tsee-OS.

phrases.english: Listen closely, to your heart's song.
phrases.romanian: Ascultă atent, la cântecul inimii tale.
phrases.transliteration: Ah-SKOOL-tuh ah-TENT, lah KUN-teh-kool im-ee-tee TAH-leh.

phrases.english: Discover your strengths, one step at a time.

phrases.transliteration: Poo-neh lah in-doy-ah-lah, ka-oot kah klah-ree-tah-teh.

phrases.romanian: Bucură-te de victorii mici, câștigă avânt.
phrases.transliteration: Boo-koo-rah-teh deh veek-toh-ree meech, kish-teeg' ah-vuhnt.

phrases.english: Your Romanian is blooming, nurture it.
A brave heart, finds a way.
Push your limits, conquer the game.
Agility and speed, our winning creed.

phrases.romanian: Tu, faci, lumea, mea, mai, luminoasă.
phrases.transliteration: Too, fach, loo-myah, myah, my, loo-mee-noh-sah.

phrases.romanian: Ne, înțelegem, perfect, unul, pe, altul.
phrases.transliteration: Neh, een-tsuh-leh-jem, pair-fect, oo-noo, peh, ahl-tool.

phrases.english: You, bring, out, the, best, in, me.
phrases.romanian: Tu, scoți, la, iveală, ce, e, mai, bun, în, mine.
phrases.transliteration: Too, scots, lah, ee-vah-lah, cheh, eh, my, boohn, een, mee-neh.

phrases.english: Let the words, find their place.
phrases.transliteration: Las-ah koo-veen-teh-leh, s'-shee g Sah-skah rost-ool.

phrases.english: Absorb the sounds, like a sponge.
Each new phrase, a building block.
Practice gently, with a calm mind.

phrases.romanian: Vom găsi, un drum mai bun.
phrases.transliteration: Vohm guh-see, oon droom my boon.

phrases.english: A gentle whisper, a new path.
phrases.romanian: Un șoptit blând, o cale nouă.
phrases.transliteration: Oon shop-teet blund, o ca-leh nuh-vuh.

phrases.english: A quiet strength, you'll find it.
phrases.romanian: O putere calmă, o vei afla.
phrases.transliteration: O poo-teh-reh cal-muh, o vey ah-flah.

phrases.english: Keep planting seeds, roots will grow.
phrases.romanian: Continuă să plantezi semințe, rădăcinile vor crește.
phrases.transliteration: Kon-too-ya sa plan-tez se-meen-tse, rə-dee-cheen-eh vol krash-teh.

phrases.romanian: Efortul de azi, fluența de mâine.
phrases.transliteration: Eh-fort-ul deh az, floo-en-tsa deh meen-eh.

phrases.english: Worry less, speak more, a lot.
phrases.romanian: Îngrijorează-te mai puțin, vorbește mai mult, mult.
phrases.transliteration: In-gree-zho-ra-tseh mai poo-tseen, vor-besh-teh mai moolt, moolt.

phrases.english: Picture the word, then say it.
Hear the sound, try to match.
Focus on your tongue, position it.
Your warm heart, beats for me.
phrases.romanian: Inima ta caldă, bate pentru mine.
phrases.transliteration: Ee-nee-mah tah cal-duh, bah-teh pehn-troo mee-neh.

phrases.english: My soft skin, feels the breeze.
My small finger, points the way.
A delicious plum, plucked right now.

phrases.romanian: Acest miere bogată, atât de aurie.
phrases.transliteration: Atsest miere bogata, atat de aurie.

phrases.english: A vibrant beet, for the salad.
Breathe in the sounds, exhale Romanian.

phrases.romanian: Acest ritm, e al tău acum.
phrases.transliteration: A-ches reetm, e al taow a-koom.

phrases.english: Each new word, a tiny victory.
phrases.romanian: Fiecare cuvânt nou, o mică victorie.
phrases.transliteration: Fee-eh-ca-re koo-voont noow, o mee-ka veek-to-ree-a.

phrases.english: Let your curiosity, guide the way.
Sun on my face, warm embrace.
phrases.romanian: Soare pe față, o îmbrățișare caldă.
phrases.transliteration: Soare pe fa-tsa, o îm-bri-tsa-re kal-da.

phrases.romanian: O carte bună, un colț liniștit.
phrases.transliteration: O kar-te bu-na, un kolts li-niș-tit.

phrases.english: Music fills the air, beyond compare.
Listen to the rhythm, feel the flow.
Taste the culture, speak the words.
Build your vocabulary, brick by brick.
In a bit, I'll be back.
The season's change, brings new hopes.
Small steps, big progress, my friend.
phrases.romanian: Pași mici, progres mare, dragul meu.
phrases.transliteration: Pashi mitch, progres mare, dragool meu.

phrases.english: Hear the rhythm, of our language.
Try a phrase, see what happens.
phrases.romanian: Încearcă o expresie, vezi ce apare.
phrases.transliteration: Incherk-a o ex-pre-si-eh, vezi che apar-eh.

phrases.romanian: Fiecare încercare, te aduce mai aproape.
phrases.transliteration: Fee-eh-kah-reh uhn-chehr-kah-reh, teh ah-doo-cheh my ah-proh-peh.

phrases.romanian: Călătoria ta în română, începe acum.
phrases.transliteration: Kuh-luh-toh-ree-ah tah uhn ro-muh-nah, uhn-cheh-peh ah-koom.

phrases.english: Feel the breeze, a light heart.
My phone, it has no signal.
I can't find my way back.

phrases.romanian: Sper ca drumul tău să fie lin.
phrases.transliteration: Spehr kah droom-ool tow sah fee-eh leen.

phrases.english: Plant a word, watch it grow.
A fox, sneaks through the grass.
A bear, ambles in the forest.
The music flows, like a river.
A quiet tune, for thoughtful minds.
The band plays on, strong and true.
phrases.romanian: Trupa cântă mai departe, tare și sincer.
phrases.transliteration: Troo-pah kuhn-tah my deh-pahr-teh, tah-reh shee seen-chehr.

phrases.romanian: Armonia se îmbină, atât de dulce.
phrases.transliteration: Ah-mo-nee-ah seh eem-bee-nah, ah-toot deh dool-cheh.

phrases.english: The sun, it warms the earth.
A gentle breeze, through the trees.
A warm thought, sent your way.
phrases.romanian: Un gând cald, trimis spre tine.
phrases.transliteration: Oon ghund kahl-d, tree-mees spre tee-ne.

phrases.romanian: Întinde o mână, pentru a ridica.
phrases.transliteration: In-teen-deh oh muh-nuh, pen-troo ah ree-dee-kah.

phrases.english: Shape your thoughts, with gentle hands.
Listen to the whisper, of what could be.
phrases.romanian: Ascultă șoapta, a ceea ce poate fi.
phrases.transliteration: Ahs-kool-tah sho-ap-tah, ahh che-ah cheh poh-teh fee.

phrases.english: A spark ignites, a new idea blooms.
phrases.romanian: O scânteie aprinde, o idee nouă înflorește.
phrases.transliteration: Oh skhn-teh-yeh ah-preen-deh, oh ee-deh-ah no-ohh hn-flo-reh-steh.

phrases.english: Follow your curiosity, it leads the way.
Build a bridge, from dream to reality.
phrases.romanian: Construiește un pod, din vis în realitate.
phrases.transliteration: Coh-stroo-yeh-steh oohn pohd, deen vees ehn reh-ah-lee-tah-teh.

phrases.romanian: Pas cu pas, curgerea prinde viață.
phrases.transliteration: Pas koo pas, koor-jeh-ree-ah prin-deh vee-at-sa.

phrases.english: Don't fear the unknown, just try.
phrases.romanian: Nu te teme de necunoscut, doar încearcă.
phrases.transliteration: Noo teh teh-meh deh neh-koo-noos-koot, dor in-che-ark-ah.

phrases.english: Let Romanian blossom, in your mind.
phrases.romanian: Lasă româna, să înflorească-n mintea ta.
phrases.transliteration: Las-a ro-MA-na, sa-N FLO-reash-ta-n MIN-ta ta.

phrases.english: Hear the melody, of new words.
Taste the culture, speak the language.
Open your ears, to Romanian sounds.
It's a beautiful day, isn't it?
phrases.romanian: E o zi frumoasă, nu-i așa?
phrases.transliteration: Eh oh zee froo-ah-soh, noo-ee sha?

phrases.english: Listen more, speak less, learn much.
phrases.romanian: Ascultă mult, vorbește puțin, învață enorm.
phrases.transliteration: As-kool-tuh moolt, vor-besht poo-tseen, een-vah-tsuh eh-norm.

phrases.english: A quiet mind, sees the hidden path.
Discover your spark, ignite your day.

phrases.romanian: Savurează fiecare clipă, trăiește cu adevărat.
phrases.transliteration: Sah-voo-rez-ah fee-eh-kah-reh klee-pah, truh-yeh-shtee koo ah-deh-vah-raht.

phrases.english: Embrace the unknown, find your way.
Listen to your inner voice, clearly.

phrases.romanian: Fie, ca bunătatea să înflorească între noi.
phrases.transliteration: Fee, ca bunătatea să înflorească între noi.

phrases.romanian: Sufletul meu, se simte mai ușor.
phrases.transliteration: Sufletul meu, se simte mai ușor.

phrases.english: A good plan, leads to success.
phrases.romanian: Un plan bun, duce la succes.
phrases.transliteration: Un PLAN bun, DU-ce la suc-CES.

phrases.english: Think in Romanian, feel the language.
A cool shoulder, to lean on.
Excuse me, can we get a window spot?
phrases.romanian: Scuzați-mă, putem, o masă, lângă geam?
phrases.transliteration: Sku-za-ti-muh, pu-tem, o ma-suh, lin-guh, gyahm?

phrases.english: Could I, have some water, please?
phrases.romanian: Ați putea, să îmi aduceți, apă?
phrases.transliteration: Aht-sy, pu-tyah, suh, eem, ah-du-chets, ah-puh?

phrases.english: We'd like, to try that, dessert.
phrases.romanian: Am vrea, să gustăm, prăjitura aia.
phrases.transliteration: Ahm, vre-ah, suh, gus-tahm, pruh-zhi-tu-ruh, a-yah.

phrases.english: Focus your mind, achieve your goals.
Embrace the challenge, find your voice.
A new language, a new world.
phrases.romanian: O limbă nouă, o lume nouă.
phrases.transliteration: Oh LEEM-buh NOH-uh, oh LOO-meh NOH-uh.

phrases.romanian: Gândește în română, înflorește mai clar.
phrases.transliteration: Guhn-desh-teh UHN ro-MOO-nuh, UHN-floh-resh-teh my KLAHR.

phrases.english: Hear the stories, of old walls.
Taste the flavors, of our food.
Explore the cities, with new eyes.
Learn a greeting, make a friend.
phrases.romanian: Învață o urare, fă un prieten.
phrases.transliteration: In-vah-tsuh oh oo-rah-reh, fuh oon pree-eh-ten.

phrases.english: Ask a question, find an answer.
phrases.romanian: Pune o întrebare, află un răspuns.
phrases.transliteration: Poo-neh oh in-treh-bah-reh, aflah oon rahs-poons.

phrases.romanian: Îmi face plăcere, să te revăd.
phrases.transliteration: eem fa-che plah-che-reh, sah teh reh-ved.

phrases.english: Hope you're having, a good one.
phrases.romanian: Sper că ai, o zi bună.
phrases.transliteration: sper kah ah-ee, oh zee boo-nah.

phrases.english: Your Romanian, is a beautiful adventure.
phrases.romanian: Româna ta, e o aventură frumoasă.
phrases.transliteration: Ro-mâ-na ta, e o a-ven-tú-ră fru-moa-să.

phrases.english: Feel the flow, of this language.
A juicy peach, smells so good.
phrases.romanian: O piersică zemoasă, miroase a bine.
phrases.transliteration: Oh pee-er-see-kah zeh-moo-ah-sah, mee-ro-ah-seh ah bee-neh.

phrases.english: A slice of cake, pure joy.
phrases.romanian: O felie de tort, bucurie pură.
phrases.transliteration: Oh feh-lee-eh deh tort, boo-koo-ree-eh poo-rah.

phrases.romanian: Peștele la grătar, atât de fraged.
phrases.transliteration: Pesh-teh-leh lah grah-tar, ah-tud deh frah-jed.

phrases.romanian: Legătura asta, e cu adevărat specială.
phrases.transliteration: Leg'ahtoor'a ahstah, eh koo adehvar'at special'a.

phrases.english: The air is crisp, smells of pine.
phrases.romanian: Aerul e proaspăt, miroase a brad.
phrases.transliteration: Aerul eh proashpet, miroaseh ah brad.

phrases.romanian: Sticlă cu apă, mereu la îndemână.
phrases.transliteration: Steek-klah koo ah-pah, meh-rev lah en-deh-muh-nah.
